social.tagline: Put your brand on one of America's youngest pro racers.

config.name: Joseph
config.tagline: Lights out and away we go.

driver.name: Joseph Saddington
driver.series: Collegiate Racing Series · FARAUSA · SCCA · IMSA
driver.note: One of America's youngest pro racers — license at 12.

dailyTasks.title: Joseph's Daily Grid
dailyTasks.subtitle: Three things every day move the needle: build, pitch, post. Check 'em off.

tasks.title: Build the Roblox game
tasks.desc: Ship one improvement today — a new level, a mechanic, or a bug fix. Small progress every day compounds.

tasks.title: Reach out to a sponsor
tasks.desc: Send at least one new pitch or follow-up. Aim for one warm intro or one cold ask per day.

tasks.title: Upload racing content
tasks.desc: Post today's clip or photo from the track. Hit all three channels — keep the streak alive.

tasks.title: Sim / practice laps
tasks.desc: 30 focused minutes on the rig. Pick one corner or skill and drill it to qualifying pace.

tasks.title: Driver training
tasks.desc: Neck, core, cardio. Race-fit drivers finish strong in the last stint.

tasks.title: Engage with fans
tasks.desc: Reply to comments and DMs across YouTube, Instagram and TikTok. Community is the long game.

dailyTasks._notes: Joseph's recurring daily checklist. Add/edit/remove tasks here. Each task needs a unique 'id' (used to remember checkmarks). Checkboxes save in the browser and reset every morning; clearing all of them in a day extends the 🔥 streak.

config._notes: Personalized for Joseph 'TOSHI #81' Saddington / Saddington Racing. Edit 'name' for the greeting, 'driver'/'team' for the hero badge, 'seriesOrder' for which championships show, 'dailyTasks' for his to-do list. Reload the page after editing.

standings._notes: Current championship points per series. NASCAR & IndyCar are overridden LIVE from ESPN at runtime; the values here are only their fallback. WEC, IMSA, WRC and Supercars are a hand-curated snapshot (no public live API) — edit these as the season unfolds. 'points' is the driver's current total. 'roundsDone'/'roundsTotal' drive the Season Progress bars.

calendar._notes: Upcoming rounds used for the hero + countdown cards. The dashboard counts down to the ISO datetime in 'start' (UTC). Keep a few future rounds per series; times are approximate — edit freely.

items.title: Dillmann, Inter Europol savoring post-injury redemption after IMSA CTMP win
items.summary: A year on from Tom Dillmann's back-breaking crash at CTMP, the Frenchman and his co-driver Jeremy Clarke returned Inter Europol to victory lane in Canada and scored the LMP2 team its first IMSA win of the season.

items.title: Bowman Gray to honor Kyle Busch next month with invitational event
items.summary: Kyle Busch will be honored by Bowman Gray Stadium next month with the creation of the “Kyle Busch Invitational” that benefits the Bundle of Joy Fund, featuring Legend and Bandolero races.

items.title: How NASCAR is targeting superspeedway fuel-saving strategies with new aero package for Daytona
items.summary: Updated aero package that will be used for the Aug. 29 Cup Series regular season finale at Daytona is another effort by NASCAR to combat fuel-saving at superspeedway events, particularly at Daytona and Talladega.

races.name: Cook Out Clash at Bowman Gray
races.winner: Ryan Preece won the Cook Out Clash at Bowman Gray Stadium, his first victory in the preseason non-points race. No cars dropped to the rear prior to the green flag to start the race.

races.name: America 250 Florida Duel at DAYTONA
races.winner: Joey Logano has won the America 250 Florida Duel #1 at DAYTONA, his fourth victory in the NASCAR Cup Series DAYTONA 500 Qualifying Race. Prior to the start of the race, no vehicle(s) dropped to the rear of the field under penalty.

races.name: America 250 Florida Duel at DAYTONA
races.winner: Chase Elliott has won the America 250 Florida Duel 2 at DAYTONA, his third victory in the NASCAR Cup Series DAYTONA 500 Qualifying Race. Prior to the start of the race, no vehicle(s) dropped to the rear of the field under penalty.

races.name: DAYTONA 500
races.winner: Tyler Reddick has won the DAYTONA 500 at Daytona International Speedway, his ninth victory in the NASCAR Cup Series. Prior to the start of the race, the following vehicle(s) dropped to the rear of the field under penalty: Nos. 1, 7, 17, 24 (backup cars).

races.name: Autotrader 400
races.winner: Tyler Reddick won the Autotrader 400 at EchoPark Speedway, his tenth NASCAR Cup Series victory. Prior to the start of the race, no cars dropped to the rear of the field under penalty.

races.name: DuraMAX Texas Grand Prix Powered by RelaDyne
races.winner: Tyler Reddick won the DuraMAX Texas Grand Prix Powered by RelaDyne at Circuit of the Americas, his 11th NASCAR Cup Series victory. Prior to the green flag to start the race, the following car dropped to the rear: No. 43 (unapproved adjustments).

races.name: Straight Talk Wireless 500
races.winner: Ryan Blaney has won the Straight Talk Wireless 500 at Phoenix Raceway, his 18th victory in the NASCAR Cup Series. Prior to the start of the race, the following vehicle(s) dropped to the rear of the field under penalty: #6 (Backup Car), #77 (Unapproved Adjustment), and #38 (Unapproved Adjustment during Practice/Prequalifying adjustments, car chief ejected, vehicle will start from the rear and perform a drive through penalty after taking the green flag.).

races.name: Pennzoil 400 presented by Jiffy Lube
races.winner: Denny Hamlin won the Pennzoil 400 presented by Jiffy Lube at Las Vegas Motor Speedway, his 61st NASCAR Cup Series victory. No drivers dropped to the rear prior to the green flag to start the race.

races.name: Goodyear 400
races.winner: Tyler Reddick won the seventh running of the Goodyear 400 at Darlington Raceway, his 12th victory in the NASCAR Cup Series. Prior to the start of the race, the following cars dropped to the rear of the field under penalty for the reasons indicated: No. 77 (unapproved adjustments).

races.name: Cook Out 400
races.winner: Chase Elliott won the Cook Out 400 at Martinsville Speedway, his 22nd career NASCAR Cup Series victory. No cars dropped to the rear to start the race.

races.name: Food City 500
races.winner: Ty Gibbs won the Food City 500 at Bristol Motor Speedway, his first NASCAR Cup Series victory. Prior to the green flag, the following car dropped to the rear for the reason indicated: No. 24 (unapproved adjustments).

races.name: AdventHealth 400
races.winner: Tyler Reddick won the AdventHealth 400 at Kansas Speedway, his 13th NASCAR Cup Series victory. The following vehicle(s) dropped to the rear of the field under penalty for the reason(s) indicated: Nos. 4 and 22 (unapproved adjustments).

races.name: Jack Link's 500
races.winner: Carson Hocevar won the Jack Link’s 500 at Talladega Superspeedway, his first NASCAR Cup Series victory. Prior to the start of the race, no cars dropped to the rear of the field under penalty.

races.name: Würth 400 presented by LIQUI MOLY
races.winner: Chase Elliott has won the Würth 400 presented by LIQUI MOLY at Texas Motor Speedway, his 23rd victory in the NASCAR Cup Series. Prior to the start of the race, the following vehicle(s) dropped to the rear of the field under penalty: No. 23 (Backup Car) and No. 3 (Engine).

races.name: Go Bowling at The Glen
races.winner: Shane van Gisbergen has won the Go Bowling at The Glen, his seventh career victory in the NASCAR Cup Series. Prior to the start of the race, no vehicles dropped to the rear of the field.

races.name: NASCAR All-Star Race
races.winner: Denny Hamlin has won the NASCAR All-Star Race at Dover Motor Speedway, his second victory in the NASCAR Cup Series annual exhibition event. Prior to the start of the race, the following vehicle(s) dropped to the rear of the field under penalty in Segment 1: No. 7 (Backup car), Nos. 16, 41, 51 (Unapproved adjustments).

races.name: Coca-Cola 600
races.winner: Daniel Suarez won the Coca-Cola 600 at Charlotte Motor Speedway, his third NASCAR Cup Series victory. Prior to the green flag to start the race, the following car dropped to the rear for the reason indicated: No. 48 (unapproved adjustments).

races.name: Cracker Barrel 400
races.winner: Denny Hamlin won the Cracker Barrel 400 at Nashville Superspeedway, his 62nd NASCAR Cup Series victory. Prior to the start of the race, no cars dropped to the rear of the field under penalty.

races.name: FireKeepers Casino 400
races.winner: Denny Hamlin has won the FireKeepers Casino 400 at Michigan International Speedway, his 63rd victory in the NASCAR Cup Series annual exhibition event. Prior to the start of the race, the following vehicle(s) dropped to the rear of the field under penalty: Nos. 2, 11, 20, 21, 24, 43 (Unapproved Adjustments).

races.name: Great American Getaway 400 presented by VISITPA
races.winner: Denny Hamlin has won the Great American Getaway 400 presented by VISITPA at Pocono Raceway, his 64th victory in the NASCAR Cup Series. Prior to the start of the race, the following vehicle(s) dropped to the rear of the field under penalty: No. 6, 23, 60 (Unapproved Adjustments).

races.name: Anduril 250
races.winner: Corey Heim won the Anduril 250 at Naval Base Coronado, his first NASCAR Cup Series victory. Prior to the green flag to start the race, the following cars dropped to the rear for the reasons indicated: Nos. 20, 43, 45 (unapproved adjustments).

races.name: Toyota / Save Mart 350
races.winner: Shane van Gisbergen has won the Toyota / Save Mart 350 at Sonoma Raceway, his eighth victory in the NASCAR Cup Series. Prior to the start of the race, the following vehicle(s) dropped to the rear of the field under penalty:  Nos. 4, 23, 43 (Unapproved Adjustments).

races.name: eero 400
races.winner: Chase Briscoe won the eero 400 at Chicagoland Speedway, his sixth NASCAR Cup Series victory. Prior to the start of the race, the following vehicle(s) dropped to the rear of the field under penalty for the reason(s) indicated: No. 71 (multiple inspection failures).

races.name: Quaker State 400 Available at Walmart
races.winner: Ryan Blaney wins the Quaker State 400 Available at Walmart at EchoPark Speedway, his 19th NASCAR Cup Series victory. Prior to the green flag to start the race, the following car dropped to the rear for the reason indicated: No. 66 (unapproved adjustments).

last.name: Quaker State 400 Available at Walmart
last.winner: Ryan Blaney wins the Quaker State 400 Available at Walmart at EchoPark Speedway, his 19th NASCAR Cup Series victory. Prior to the green flag to start the race, the following car dropped to the rear for the reason indicated: No. 66 (unapproved adjustments).

sponsors.source: saddingtonracing.com (Wen Moon / HODL counts) + confirmed deals (Satoshi / Paddock)
sponsors._notes: Editable sponsorship ledger for the dashboard 'Sponsorship Secured' section. amount = tier price, count = backers in that tier. Wen Moon/HODL counts are published on saddingtonracing.com; Satoshi/Paddock confirmed by Peter. Update counts as new deals close.
